name: Poe
data_egress_concerns: Prompts are routed to multiple third-party model providers (OpenAI, Anthropic, Google, Meta, etc.) with varying data policies
Users may unknowingly send data to a model with weaker privacy controls than expected
Conversation history stored on Quora infrastructure with Quora's data retention policies
No unified enterprise data governance across the multi-model architecture
training_use_default: Poe routes queries to third-party models; each model provider's training policy applies independently. Quora's own terms allow use of user content for service improvement. No enterprise training exclusion is available.
